raw: {"perspective": "Legal Advisor", "summary": "Conducted research on GDPR Article 22, AZ Personal Data Protection Act, platform liability, data processor agreements, and Terms of Service. Identified potential compliance issues and proposed actions to address them.", "key_sources": ["GDPR Article 22", "AZ Personal Data Protection Act", "Supabase", "Google Cloud", "Railway"], "gaps_in_current_canon": ["Lack of explicit consent flow for automated decision-making", "Insufficient compliance with AZ Personal Data Protection Act for Baku launch", "Unclear platform liability for AURA score usage in hiring decisions", "Missing data processor agreements for Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway", "Inadequate Terms of Service for AI-generated assessments"], "proposed_action": ["Implement explicit consent flow for automated decision-making", "Conduct compliance review for AZ Personal Data Protection Act", "Establish clear guidelines for platform liability regarding AURA score usage", "Establish data processor agreements with Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway", "Update Terms of Service to cover AI-generated assessments"], "whistleblower_flag": null}
summary: Conducted research on GDPR Article 22, AZ Personal Data Protection Act, platform liability, data processor agreements, and Terms of Service. Identified potential compliance issues and proposed actions to address them.
gaps_in_current_canon: Lack of explicit consent flow for automated decision-making
Insufficient compliance with AZ Personal Data Protection Act for Baku launch
Unclear platform liability for AURA score usage in hiring decisions
Missing data processor agreements for Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway
Inadequate Terms of Service for AI-generated assessments
proposed_action: Implement explicit consent flow for automated decision-making
Conduct compliance review for AZ Personal Data Protection Act
Establish clear guidelines for platform liability regarding AURA score usage
Establish data processor agreements with Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway
Update Terms of Service to cover AI-generated assessments
